creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text: No reaction, closing. There are some people (including me) using ZFS on sparc64 without problems. One ZFS import (but I would need to dig if it was v15 or v28) did break the userland<->kernel compat layer for using old userland commands with new kernels. The solution here was to update userland _and_ kernel at the same time without booting into the new kernel first.
